ladder_stage_note: M0 = Benchmark harness audit per architect §B.9.3 (20 known problems / chain-backed / no market / prove no fake accepted). M1 + M2 use this manifest as base with ladder_stage + problem_set deltas.

problem_set.problem_ids_correction_note: List corrected mid-batch to match handover/tests/scripts/m0_problems.txt actual batch contents (the source-of-truth for the M0 retry run). Original list was AI-author best-effort recall; corrected commit reflects authoritative file content. Per anti-drift contract: batch identity is determined by m0_problems.txt; manifest problem_ids is META-data redundant with the file. No batch invalidation; correction is annotation-only.

model.name: deepseek-chat
model.version_pin_note: DeepSeek does not publish stable model-version IDs; pin captured by batch start UTC. Drift recurrence handled via per-LLM-call budget tracker (atom A) — DegradedLLM halt on N consecutive trivial responses.

runtime.external_timeout_note: External `timeout 120` is safety net per architect §1 Q5 + FR-18.2; primary cap is internal aggregate_per_run_wallclock_seconds (600s) AND per-LLM-call budget. M0 retry uses 120s tightened external timeout based on H0 evidence that today's substantive responses solve in <90s; external timeout may be loosened to architect §B.9.3 spec 600s if M0 retry surfaces problems hitting it.
runtime.condition_note: n1 = run_swarm path with single agent (per architect M-ladder M0 spec; M2 uses n5)

seeds.boltzmann_seed_note: M0 + M1 do not exercise Boltzmann (single-agent); M2 will pin BOLTZMANN_SEED=12345 per TB-16.x.2.4 precedent

lean_environment.mathlib_commit_capture: captured at batch start via `lake exe cache get` state (mathlib commit hash recorded in genesis_payload.toml constitution_root.lean_runtime block + verified at preflight stage)

turingosv4_commit_note: HEAD at batch start = TB-18 Atom B-design + Atom A budget tracker + Atom E RunOutcome propagation + Atom 0 charter ratification. Predecessor TB-17 SHIPPED FINAL @ 8e3d5cc.
boltzmann_mode_note: M0 + M1: n_agents=1 (Boltzmann not exercised). M2: n_agents=5, observe-only per architect Q3 (PRE-17.5 EXCLUDED from TB-18); price mask disabled.
anti_drift_contract: Manifest is FROZEN at batch start. If any field changes mid-batch (e.g. model version drift, mathlib re-fetch), batch is INVALIDATED and must restart with new manifest (new created_at_utc + new turingosv4_commit + new manifest_id).
per_run_linking: Each problem run records `batch_manifest_id` in its EvidenceCapsule.batch_manifest_id field (atom A future-binding for canonical schema; today recorded as sidecar in evidence/<run>/M0_RUN_MANIFEST.json copy). Replay tooling cross-checks every run's batch_manifest_id matches the committed manifest.
verification_note_atom_b_substrate: Per TB-18 atom B-design ship verdict (commit 7bb18b4): M0/M1/M2 of this manifest run on EXISTING single-task evaluator substrate (atom A budget enforcement IS wired). Atom B substantive multi-task driver SKIPPED in TB-18; TB-18.B-impl follow-up + TB-18.F single-chain 13/13 evidence will produce the canonical replacement chain shape (ratified per architect Q2 ship-claim narrowing).
